title: エリザベス女王杯の後に・暴虐女王！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka wins the race and becomes queen of the
day! She gleefully exercises her royal command
over Daiwa Scarlet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finding the commands humiliating, Daiwa Scarlet
flies into a rage.
